name: Creamy Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the broccoli and rinse well. Cut the stems into thin slices. The broccoli flowerettes will be cooked separately.
2. Sauté the green onions in butter in a heavy skillet until soft but not brown.
3. Add the broccoli stems and chicken broth to the skillet. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until the stems are just barely soft (about 15 minutes).
5. Place the mixture in a food processor and puree.
6. Return the puree to the skillet.
7. Add flour dissolved in a little water.
8. Add salt, pepper, and half & half.
9. Cook the broccoli flowerettes in a little water until tender.
10. Add the flowerettes to the soup and bring to a boil, stirring steadily, until the soup becomes thick and creamy.
11. Serve with cheese alongside so that it can be added to individual portions.
